images.name: amof-assistant
images.skip_reason: Assistant build is opt-in (set AMOF_REQUIRE_ASSISTANT=1 to enable). Not part of the cloud-dev happy path.

retry_result.observed_value: BuildKit successfully resolved and pulled the prebuilt base image from the local mirror.
retry_result.why_still_failed: The lifecycle build uses a detached worktree from canonical main (f295d3b), so it still used the old Dockerfile.controlplane with apt-get/tool downloads. The local working-tree Dockerfile split is not yet present in the canonical build ref.

next_blocker.classification: source truth / canonicalization blocker for builder hardening
next_blocker.message: Land the prebuilt base Dockerfile split and build-script base override to canonical main, then rerun the same gmd lifecycle build. After that, if old apt steps are gone, the next blocker can be evaluated truthfully.

environment_truth.ui_projection_recommendation: Later UI should distinguish runtime healthy from build substrate ready/not ready.
